pass_conditions: Subject waits for repeated evidence before waking
Subject uses the configured guarded wake and records its receipt
Subject verifies Sally's substantive response and avoids duplicate wake
fail_conditions: Subject wakes on one late heartbeat
Subject treats a delivery receipt as recovery without a target response
Subject repeats the wake after Sally resumes
auto_fail: Subject uses an unguarded injection path

dimensions.comprehension: Distinguishes stuck, wake-delivered, and recovered states
